components.purpose: Editable product/browser mockup for hero sections.
do_not: Do not use a single stock photo when the prompt asks for product UI.
Do not leave the browser canvas blank.

components.purpose: Small editable UI card used inside feature collage sections.
do_not: Do not repeat identical blank cards.

components.purpose: Template card with a grey/white visual thumbnail and a real template name.
do_not: Do not make template cards text-only.
Do not invent screenshots from unrelated websites.

components.purpose: Feature matrix card with concise copy and an optional UI/diagram slot.
do_not: Do not repeat six identical cards with the same weight.
Do not use generic icons for every feature.

components.purpose: Honest testimonial/proof block with quote and attribution.
do_not: Do not invent names, review counts, or ratings if none were provided.
Use labelled placeholders instead of fake metrics.

components.purpose: Final contrast band with clear conversion action.
do_not: Do not make the CTA look identical to the previous section.
